page_content:
ARMY119 ARMY ROTC INDEPENDENT STUDY (1 Credit)

Exploration of the Army Leadership Model through group discussion, leadership exercises and research.

Restriction: Permission of UGST-Army ROTC.

Repeatable to: 2 credits.

Credit Only Granted for. ARMY119 or ARMY105.

Additional Information: -Intended to impart the lecture curriculum of ARMY105 without the labs.
